{"filled_text": "19 April 2026

Dear Demo Student,

Thank you for applying to the Yayasan UM Scholarship.

After careful review of your application, the Yayasan UM Scholarship Committee has decided not to award the scholarship at this time.

Reason cited by the reviewer:
[Coordinator notes inserted here]

Appeal pathway:
You may submit a written appeal to the Yayasan UM Office within 14 days of this letter. Appeals should address the reviewer's specific concerns and include any new supporting evidence.

We encourage you to continue applying for other available scholarships including the UM Bursary and corporate sponsorships. The UniGuide platform will help you find the ones you qualify for.

Regards,
Yayasan UM Scholarship Office
Universiti Malaya", "placeholder_values": {"{{date}}": "19 April 2026", "{{student_name}}": "Demo Student", "{{procedure_name}}": "Yayasan UM Scholarship"}, "unfilled_placeholders": ["{{coordinator_notes}}"]}
